Photorealistic high-quality studio photograph of The Chair (JH501) by Hans J. Wegner. Slot intent: hero. A studio composition of Hans J. Wegner's The Chair (JH501) in a three-quarter perspective, showcasing its full form with warm, diffused lighting (2700-3000K) that highlights the curved wooden frame, seamless joinery, and Danish Modern design against a neutral, era-appropriate background like a soft beige or light gray gradient.
